else:
    print("Please enter a numeric age.")

name: STDIN Input
description: Read from stdin and compute factorial

files.name: index.php
files.content:
<?php
function factorial($n) {
    return $n <= 1 ? 1 : $n * factorial($n - 1);
}

echo "Enter a number: ";
$n = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
echo "Factorial: " . factorial($n) . "\n";

name: Array Toolkit
description: Sort, map, and filter arrays

files.name: index.php
files.content:
<?php
$data = [5, 1, 8, 3, 2, 9];
sort($data);

$double = array_map(fn($x) => $x * 2, $data);
$gt10 = array_filter($double, fn($x) => $x > 10);

echo "Sorted: " . implode(', ', $data) . "\n";
echo "Double: " . implode(', ', $double) . "\n";
echo "Greater than 10: " . implode(', ', $gt10) . "\n";

name: JSON Sales Report
description: Decode JSON and print totals

files.name: index.php
files.content:
<?php
$json = '[{"item":"Book","qty":2,"price":12.5},{"item":"Pen","qty":5,"price":1.2}]';
$rows = json_decode($json, true);

$total = 0;
foreach ($rows as $row) {
    $line = $row['qty'] * $row['price'];
    $total += $line;
    echo $row['item'] . " => " . $line . "\n";
}

echo "Total: " . $total . "\n";

name: Modular Calculator
description: Multi-file project: operations module, validator, and main entry point

files.name: main.py
files.content:
from operations import add, subtract, multiply, divide
from validator import validate_number

def main():
    print("=== Modular Calculator ===")
    print(f"add(10, 3)       = {add(10, 3)}")
    print(f"subtract(10, 3)  = {subtract(10, 3)}")
    print(f"multiply(10, 3)  = {multiply(10, 3)}")
    print(f"divide(10, 3)    = {divide(10, 3):.2f}")
    print(f"divide(10, 0)    = {divide(10, 0)}")
    print()

    test_values = ["42", "hello", "3.14", "", "-7"]
    for v in test_values:
        result = validate_number(v)
        print(f"validate('{v}') -> {result}")

main()

validator.py

name: Student Manager
description: Multi-file OOP: Student model, GradeBook service, and main app

files.name: main.py
files.content:
from student import Student
from gradebook import GradeBook

def main():
    book = GradeBook()

    book.add_student(Student("Alice", [85, 92, 78]))
    book.add_student(Student("Bob", [70, 65, 80]))
    book.add_student(Student("Charlie", [95, 98, 100]))

    print("=== Grade Book ===")
    book.print_report()

    print(f"\nClass average: {book.class_average():.1f}")
    print(f"Top student:   {book.top_student().name}")

main()

name: Text Adventure
description: Multi-file game: world map, player, game engine, and main loop

files.name: main.py
files.content:
from player import Player
from world import World
from engine import GameEngine

def main():
    world = World()
    player = Player("Hero")
    engine = GameEngine(world, player)

    # Simulate a short adventure
    engine.look()
    engine.move("north")
    engine.look()
    engine.pickup()
    engine.move("east")
    engine.look()
    engine.show_inventory()

main()

name: Modular CLI App
description: Multi-file: Config, Logger, UserService with require/include pattern

files.name: index.php
files.content:
<?php
require_once 'config.php';
require_once 'Logger.php';
require_once 'UserService.php';

$logger = new Logger(APP_NAME);
$userService = new UserService($logger);

$logger->info("Application started (v" . APP_VERSION . ")");

$userService->register("alice", "alice@example.com");
$userService->register("bob", "bob@example.com");
$userService->register("alice", "dupe@example.com"); // duplicate

echo "\n=== All Users ===\n";
$userService->listAll();

echo "\nSearch 'bob': ";
$found = $userService->find("bob");
echo $found ? $found['email'] : 'not found';
echo "\n";

files.name: config.php
files.content:
<?php
/**
 * Application configuration constants.
 */
define('APP_NAME', 'MyApp');
define('APP_VERSION', '1.0.0');
define('MAX_USERS', 100);

files.name: Logger.php
files.content:
<?php
/**
 * Simple logger with timestamp and app name prefix.
 */
class Logger {
    private string $appName;

    public function __construct(string $appName) {
        $this->appName = $appName;
    }

    public function info(string $msg): void {
        echo "[{$this->appName}] INFO: {$msg}\n";
    }

    public function warn(string $msg): void {
        echo "[{$this->appName}] WARN: {$msg}\n";
    }

    public function error(string $msg): void {
        echo "[{$this->appName}] ERROR: {$msg}\n";
    }
}

files.name: UserService.php
files.content:
<?php
/**
 * Manages user registration and lookup.
 */
class UserService {
    private array $users = [];
    private Logger $logger;

    public function __construct(Logger $logger) {
        $this->logger = $logger;
    }

    public function register(string $name, string $email): bool {
        if (isset($this->users[$name])) {
            $this->logger->warn("User '$name' already exists.");
            return false;
        }
        $this->users[$name] = ['name' => $name, 'email' => $email];
        $this->logger->info("Registered user: $name ($email)");
        return true;
    }

    public function find(string $name): ?array {
        return $this->users[$name] ?? null;
    }

    public function listAll(): void {
        foreach ($this->users as $user) {
            echo "  {$user['name']} <{$user['email']}>\n";
        }
    }
}

title: User Input (fmt.Scan)
description: Read user input from stdin with fmt.Scan

files.name: main.go
files.content:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string
	var age int

	fmt.Print("What is your name? ")
	fmt.Scanln(&name)

	fmt.Print("How old are you? ")
	fmt.Scanln(&age)

	fmt.Printf("Hello %s, you are %d years old!\n", name, age)
}

title: Classes & Mixins
description: Explore Ruby classes, modules, and mixins

files.name: main.rb
files.content:
# Ruby Classes & Mixins

module Printable
  def to_s
    vars = instance_variables.map { |v| "#{v}=#{instance_variable_get(v)}" }.join(', ')
    "#{self.class.name}(#{vars})"
  end
end

class Animal
  include Printable
  attr_reader :name, :sound

  def initialize(name, sound)
    @name = name
    @sound = sound
  end

  def speak
    "#{@name} says #{@sound}!"
  end
end

class Dog < Animal
  attr_reader :breed

  def initialize(name, breed)
    super(name, 'Woof')
    @breed = breed
  end

  def fetch(item)
    "#{@name} fetches the #{item}!"
  end
end

class Cat < Animal
  def initialize(name)
    super(name, 'Meow')
  end

  def purr
    "#{@name} purrs softly..."
  end
end

animals = [
  Dog.new('Rex', 'Labrador'),
  Cat.new('Whiskers'),
  Dog.new('Buddy', 'Beagle'),
]

puts '=== Animals ==='
animals.each do |a|
  puts "  #{a} -> #{a.speak}"
end

puts "\n#{animals[0].fetch('ball')}"
puts animals[1].purr

title: Modular Shop
description: Multi-file: Product catalog, cart, and main script with require_relative

files.name: main.rb
files.content:
require_relative 'product'
require_relative 'cart'

catalog = [
  Product.new('Laptop', 999.99),
  Product.new('Mouse', 29.99),
  Product.new('Keyboard', 79.99),
  Product.new('Monitor', 349.99),
]

puts '=== Product Catalog ==='
catalog.each { |p| puts "  #{p}" }

cart = Cart.new
cart.add(catalog[0])
cart.add(catalog[1], 2)
cart.add(catalog[2])

puts "\n=== Shopping Cart ==="
cart.display

puts "\nTotal: $#{'%.2f' % cart.total}"
puts "Items: #{cart.item_count}"

files.name: product.rb
files.content:
# Represents a product with a name and price.
class Product
  attr_reader :name, :price

  def initialize(name, price)
    @name = name
    @price = price
  end

  def to_s
    "#{@name} – $#{'%.2f' % @price}"
  end
end

files.name: cart.rb
